title: Animetro
body:
[![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1321365/description_19767e94-ef82-4569-92c6-b1e8b60e6e07.png)](https://discord.gg/XgH4EpyPD2)

![V4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d79c6239fa151a6512e3a85cfb53afb26c846bca.png)

> *A lightweight cel-shaded look with subtle retro display artifacts.*

![V1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12e910d3a3bab023bbcaecdf4fb2bde8d694447.png)

This shader focuses on stylizing Minecraft's default rendering through a simple post-processing pipeline rather than replacing the game's lighting model. Colors are quantized into discrete brightness bands, outlines are generated from screen-space color differences, and subtle CRT-inspired effects are applied to create a clean cartoon-like presentation while preserving vanilla readability.

![V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56f13b6d577e0d9c2abf1d37f64db1df822b8eb1.png)

![V3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0d2ce9ef1668b1d61b65f7956633d984ec7c80e.png)

---

### ✨ Highlights

**Cel-Shaded Color Quantization.**
The final image is processed into distinct brightness bands using luminance-based quantization. Instead of smooth tonal gradients, surfaces transition between defined lighting levels, giving terrain, structures, and entities a hand-drawn or animated appearance.



**Screen-Space Edge Detection.**
Outline shading is produced by comparing neighboring pixels in screen space. Areas with strong color contrast receive darker edge lines, helping separate shapes and improve scene definition without requiring geometry-based outlines.

**Subtle Chromatic Fringing.**
A lightweight RGB channel offset shifts the red and blue channels slightly apart. The effect is intentionally restrained and adds a small amount of visual separation around high-contrast areas without heavily distorting the image.

**Saturation Enhancement.**
Colors receive a moderate saturation boost after cel-shading is applied. This helps preserve vibrancy while avoiding excessive crushing of darker tones.

**CRT-Style Scanlines.**
A faint scanline pattern is layered over the image using screen-space modulation. The effect remains subtle and contributes a retro display aesthetic without significantly reducing visibility.

**Lightweight Rendering Pipeline.**
The shader performs most of its work as a single fullscreen post-process pass. No advanced global illumination, volumetrics, reflections, or temporal effects are present, keeping the implementation straightforward and performance-friendly.

---

### ⚙️ Compatibility

* Uses GLSL 1.20 shader programs.
* Designed around the OptiFine/Iris shader pipeline structure.
* Includes basic GBuffer rendering and a composite post-processing pass.
* Compatible with standard Minecraft lighting and lightmaps.

Because the shader relies primarily on post-processing, hardware requirements are relatively low compared to modern physically based shader packs.
